notes: Final 2.0.4 Perfect Re-encode fix: ON now always forces the single Perfect H.264 Main re-encode, even for already H.264 Main files, so every ON output gets the full CRF 13 Very Slow x264 structure: avc1, yuv420p, exact source CFR, FPS-matched closed GOP, 2 refs, 2 B-frames, stronger AQ/detail retention, audio copy-first behavior, clean MP4 cleanup, and Seven finalizer preservation. OFF remains the no-visual-reencode cleanup/finalizer path.
